releaseNotes: Strips UTF-8 BOM from all xml parts in output xlsx. v1.2.4 only fixed the cell-type issue (t="str" → t="s") but MiniExcel was still writing [Content_Types].xml, workbook.xml, and styles.xml with a leading BOM that strict OOXML parsers (PhpSpreadsheet, libxml2-based email validators) reject before they even reach the cell data. v1.2.5 strips the BOM from every .xml/.rels part so the file is fully spec-compliant.
